message:
test(fwc): add 30 history reversal, auth bootstrap, confusion corpus, lifecycle supply chain tests

History reversal/undo (8 tests, bead 1g7z0.28.4): entry lookup, offline,
safety warnings, read-only no-reversal, mutating rollback plan, cascade
prevention, scope defaults, connector context
Auth bootstrap/connect (7 tests, bead 1g7z0.27.2): unknown connector,
offline, OAuth device code, API key storage, secret validation, guided
flow steps, next_actions
Confusion corpus (8 tests, bead 1g7z0.26.1): misspelled command
correction, wrong subcommand, arg order, pipe vs pipeline, unknown
flag, empty command, case insensitive, extra positional args
Lifecycle supply chain (7 tests, bead 1g7z0.8.3): install verify-only,
install offline, update id mismatch, update offline, rollback offline,
pin version, unpin confirmation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
